summary: Minimal review noting stretched‑out versions of Blow Away, Bird Song and The Other One; no clear details on recording quality.
review: The lone reviewer points out that the band “stretched out” a few tunes—Blow Away, Bird Song and The Other One—but offers no assessment of performance nuance or sound. There are no comments about the source or clarity of the recording, leaving the technical quality unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a 0‑star rating; lacking detail on both performance and audio quality leads to a low overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix balance, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes the band stretched out certain tunes, implying a more exploratory pacing but offers no further evaluation.
